entities.goat: a white goat with a bell

scenes.title: The Hillside
scenes.background_prompt: A green grassy hillside sloping steeply downward, with wildflowers in red and yellow growing on the slope, and a clear blue sky. No people, no animals, no structures.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A green grassy hillside on a clear day. At the very top of the steep slope, a large round gray boulder sits precariously, as if it could roll at any moment. At the bottom of the hill, a simple wooden picket fence in natural brown wood stretches across the base, with a few posts slightly crooked. The fence looks fragile compared to the massive boulder above. To the right side of the hill, standing safely on a flat ledge, a white goat with a small brass bell on a red collar watches the scene with its head turned toward the boulder. Red poppies and yellow buttercups grow scattered across the grassy slope. The sky is a clear bright blue with a single wispy cloud.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place boulder at the very top of the slope, sitting precariously. Place fence across the base of the hill, simple wooden picket. Place goat on a flat ledge to the right, standing and watching with head turned toward the boulder.
